title: Strength Sword
description: Remake of the Strength Smp Strength Sword Made by Luxon
body:
📌 Commands

/strengthsword or /ss – Give the Strength Sword

⚙️ Configuration

The plugin generates a folder called StrengthSword.
Inside config.yml, you can customize stuff in the plugin

🔓 Abilities & Progression

Abilities are unlocked by getting kills with the Strength Sword.
❗ You cannot kill the same player twice to progress.

Stage	Requirement	Unlocked Ability	Input
0	Acquired Sword	None	—
1	1 Kill	Double Strength	Swap Hand (F)
2	2 Kills	Warden Blast	Right-Click
3	3 Kills	Drain Strength	Sneak + Swap Hand (F)
⚠️ Important Note

The sword holder is tracked.

If the holder dies, all stages reset to Stage 0.

📜 Player Commands

/stage – Check your current stage
(Shows current holder if stage is 0)

/sword holder – See who currently holds the Strength Sword

🛠️ Admin Commands

/sword reload – Reload config.yml

/sword remove – Removes the sword from the holder and resets progress

/setstage <0–3> – Manually set the sword’s stage

🤝 Trust Commands

/trust add <player> – Add a player to your trust list (immune to Drain Strength)

/trust remove <player> – Remove a player from your trust list

Note:
Trust is managed by the current holder and resets when the holder dies or changes.
